name: Process Discovery
description: Enumerate running processes via `ps` plus a snapshot of /proc PID count. MITRE ATT&CK T1057 — adversaries inventory running processes to find AV, EDR, and admin tooling. Read-only. Safety: refuse-by-default unless --target <whitelisted_IP> or --unsafe-local.
exec: ps -eo pid,ppid,user,comm 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo '---'; ls /proc 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^[0-9]+$' | wc -l
